docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PEREZ, VICTOR SUAZO AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, ROBERTO DBA E.C. AUTO BODY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-11-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-14-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE SETTLEMENT, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 5-14-03 @ 10 AM. AND THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE ACTION W/ PREJUDICE.
PLTF CONTINUANCE REQUEST, FILED. $10 FEE PAID. TO BE SIGNED BY COMMISSIONER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ, VICTOR SUAZO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTILLO, ROBERTO DBA E.C. AUTO BODY $1,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,120.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-14-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-26-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
